title: Create: SteelWorks
description: This mod adds Steel element to mod Create
body:
Create: SteelWorks is an immersive addon for the Create mod that introduces a full-featured steel production system into Minecraft. Designed to seamlessly integrate with Create’s mechanical automation, this mod adds a realistic metallurgy chain that enhances both progression and industrial gameplay.

From raw ore processing to refined steel plates, players can build complex production lines that simulate real-world steel manufacturing. The mod introduces new materials such as Steel Blend, Unsmoothed Steel Ingots, and Polished Steel Ingots, each requiring mechanical processing steps like crushing, smelting, and polishing. These materials can then be used to craft advanced components, machines, and structures that expand the possibilities of your factory builds.

Whether you're designing a steampunk steel mill or automating high-tier machinery, Create: SteelWorks provides the tools and depth to take your engineering to the next level. The mod is optimized for both client and server environments, ensuring smooth multiplayer experiences.

**Key Features:**
- A complete steel production chain integrated with Create’s mechanical systems
- New items: Steel Blend, Unsmoothed Steel Ingot, Steel Ingot, Steel Plate
- Realistic processing steps: crushing, smelting, polishing
- Compatible with both Forge and Fabric loaders
- Server-friendly and modpack-ready
- Actively maintained and open to community feedback

**Requirements:**
- Minecraft 1.XX.X
- Create mod (latest compatible version)
- Forge or Fabric loader

**Recommended For:**
- Players who enjoy automation, industry, and immersive progression
- Modpack creators looking to expand Create’s tech tree
- Multiplayer servers focused on engineering and factory gameplay

Join the growing community of engineers and metallurgists who are reshaping Minecraft’s industrial age—one steel beam at a time.
